message:
� Fix test failure: use regular function for mock constructor (#11085)

The CacheWorkerRpc mock used an arrow function in mockImplementation(),
but arrow functions cannot be used as constructors. When initCacheWorker()
calls 'new CacheWorkerRpc(worker)', the arrow function fails with
'is not a constructor'. Switch to a regular function expression.

Signed-off-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ks-ci-bot <ks-ci-bot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
